reviews.comment:
Fui atendida por Federico para realizar el Service completo de 2 camionetas en los boxes.
Fui muy bien atendida. En todo momento Federico me comentó las promociones y descuentos que tendría como socia del ACA y de YPF Serviclub y mantuvo conmigo un excelente feedback.
Gracias Federico.

(Translated by Google)
I had my two trucks serviced by Federico in the service bays.
I received excellent service. Federico kept me informed about the promotions and discounts I would receive as a member of the ACA and YPF Serviclub, and he maintained excellent communication with me.
Thank you, Federico.
